package.name: mserve_drivechain
package.description: Drivechain node for mServe. Pure hardware driver for up to 4 DDSM115 motors via a Waveshare DDSM Driver HAT (A) on Raspberry Pi GPIO UART. Accepts MotorCommands directly (no kinematics — that belongs in mserve_base). Supports a sim backend (default) for development without the HAT attached.
